errorPattern: Did not receive invitation email for phil+l-.*@adept.at after 2 minutes

fix.summary: While browser2 polls Mailosaur in waitUntil, periodically issue a no-op command on browser1 (e.g. getUrl) so the admin session stays active on Sauce and does not idle-timeout during the long email wait.
fix.pattern: Inside browser2.waitUntil({ ... }), keep `await browser1.getUrl()` (or another cheap command) in the loop alongside multiMailosaur.waitForMessageCriteria / getEmailByID — mirrors the 'keep browser1 alive on Sauce' pattern in invite.org.learner.dev.ts.

investigationFindings: Repo convention: long waits on browser2 embed browser1.getUrl() to keep Sauce from dropping the inactive multiremote session. Removing that ping reproduces a 2-minute Mailosaur timeout even when email is delivered promptly.
rootCauseChain: TIMING_ISSUE -> Sauce multiremote idle -> browser1 session lost -> browser2 waitUntil never resolves
